problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus may resolve Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
